justifications.clarity: Exceptionally well-structured with precise definitions, smooth transitions, context/deepdive box framing throughout, and no remaining ambiguities.
justifications.rigor: All mathematical claims verified correct: Chinchilla (N*=1.46e10, D*=1.14e12, ratio≈78), FinBERT BERT-base (110M, d=768), ZeRO ~2x/~4x reductions, LoRA α/r scaling, ROUGE clipping, PPO→J maximized.
justifications.completeness: All 8 learning objectives addressed; 3 tagged exercises [B]/[I]/[A]; closing synthesis paragraph; BloombergGPT, FinBERT, governance, and bias sections complete.
justifications.pedagogy: Three well-calibrated exercises, multiple worked examples, formal definitions/theorems/proofs, context/deepdive scaffolding, clear adaptation spectrum framework.
justifications.style: No \paragraph{} labels; consistent British English; correct em-dashes; tables/figures properly captioned; natural flowing prose throughout.
